description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Event Details

Date: Saturday, May 23

Meeting time: 10:00 a.m.

Meeting place: Daini Ward District Administrative Center

Route: Daini Ward District Administrative Center → Akane-ga Pass → Misugi Dai Seven-Eleven → Asahi Mountain Observation Park → Hanno Central Ward District Administrative Center → Hanno City Hall

Distance: Approximately 14 kilometers

Estimated duration: Approximately 4 hours 30 minutes

Fee: 200 yen (for materials; collected on the day)

What to bring: Lunch box, drinks, rain gear, transit IC card, Sugo-Ashi handbook (if you have one)

Other: Please arrange your own insurance.

Registration: By Tuesday, May 19, contact ASA Hanno by phone at 972-4701 or fax at 974-2190

Weather cancellation check: Check for cancellations due to weather with ASA Hanno Central after 3:00 p.m. the day before

Inquiries: Onda, 090-2205-8073

Organizer: Hanno Walking Club

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/12385.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-Ashi Event: Walk the Hanno Two-Day Naguri Course on Saturday, May 23, 2026
